name: Delhi (India)

colors.symbolism: the emblem of the Government of the National Capital Territory of Delhi

description: A white field charged in the centre with the emblem of the Government of the National Capital Territory of Delhi.
history: Delhi has no official flag. The National Capital Territory is represented for official purposes by the national flag of India, and informally by a white banner bearing the emblem of the Government of Delhi.

features.symbolism: the plain field of the government banner

features.role: Emblem of the Government of the National Capital Territory of Delhi
features.symbolism: the official emblem used by the Delhi government
